Patch Set 1:

I couldn't actually find anywhere that checks/enforces the ZFS 0.7.0 version is met?  That should be done early in the configure check (and patch series) and return an error, and then the later checks/patches can all just be removed.  That avoids a lot of patch churn and added testing for the series.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

Honestly, even ZFS 0.7.0 is ancient these days (ZFS 0.7.9 was the default for Lustre 2.10 in 2019), and we are now building with ZFS 2.1 on master.

My preference would be to require at least ZFS 0.8.0, if not 2.0.0.

That said, this is still a cleanup and not *worse* than before so +1, but not as much a cleanup as possible.

parents.subject: LU-16053 build: add project quota configure check

commit.subject: LU-16053 build: remove obsolete ZFS configure checks
commit.message:
LU-16053 build: remove obsolete ZFS configure checks

Require a minimum ZFS version of 0.7.  All checks for functionality
known to be present in this version have been removed.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Brian Behlendorf <behlendorf1@llnl.gov>
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I8dfbc0f0d0112190f9f9610803c2ecda55632685
